hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '^git\s+push'; then superx-state check-quality-gates; fi
if [ -f superx-state.json ]; then superx-state mark-dirty 2>/dev/null || true; fi
if [ ! -f superx-state.json ]; then superx-state init 2>/dev/null || true; fi
